```{r}
pacman::p_load(
  Ipaper, data.table, dplyr, lubridate, 
  ggplot2, patchwork, terra, 
  stringr, tidyterra, 
  rcolors, gg.layers
)
```

```{r}
fs = dir2("./Project_ShiYan/data/basins/", "*.tif")
f = fs[1]

set_font()

sites = str_extract(basename(fs), "(?<=_).*(?=_)")
names(fs) = sites

ps = foreach(f = fs, site = sites, i = icount()) %do% {
  ra = rast(f)
  plot_basin(ra) + ggtitle(site)
}

g = wrap_plots(ps, nrow = 2) + 
  plot_layout(guides = "collect")
write_fig(g, 'd:/Rplot.pdf', 10, 5)
# ra = rast(f)
# plot(ra)
```

```{r}
nbrk <- 10
cols <- get_color(rcolors$amwg256, nbrk) %>% rev()
# cols[c(0, 1) + nbrk / 2] <- "grey90"

plot_basin <- function(ra) {
  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_spatraster(data = ra) +
    scale_fill_gradientn2(na.value = "transparent", colors = cols) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major = element_line(linewidth = 0.2)
    )
  p
}
p = plot_basin(ra)
write_fig(p, 'd:/Rplot.pdf', 10, 5)
```
